meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: User Onboarding to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn how to leverage advanced user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to maximize retention and revenue.
content.answer_block: Marketing is often just a symptom of poor retention. By building automated, high-intent user onboarding flows, you convert every signup into a power user. Use Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous logic implementation, turning your product into its own best marketing asset without needing a growth team.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that your code is only as valuable as the user's ability to extract it. You’ve built a robust tool, yet your analytics show a graveyard of signups who never activated. You don't have a marketing department, and honestly, you shouldn't need one to get your first 100 paying clients.

The secret isn't better ads; it's better onboarding. When you treat the first five minutes of a user's experience as a product feature rather than a hurdle, you solve the 'no marketing' problem at the source. This is how you transform a churn-prone visitor into a long-term contract.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact feature that provides value. We use Antigravity to build a high-conversion welcome modal that directs users to this feature immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-conversion, responsive onboarding modal component in React. The modal should feature a progress bar, a clear value proposition header, and a single primary CTA that triggers the user's first core task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate onboarding-modal.tsx component based on the provided Antigravity design system'

steps.title: Build a Segmented Flow
steps.description: Don't treat all users the same. Use Claude Code to create logic that maps onboarding steps to the user's specific persona.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dynamic onboarding state machine that adjusts the user's path based on their selected intent (e.g., 'Freelancer' vs 'Agency').
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --action 'implement state machine logic based on user persona'

steps.title: Implement Interactive Walkthroughs
steps.description: Passive tutorials fail. Use Antigravity to scaffold interactive hotspots that guide users through your UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an interactive 'spotlight' component that highlights UI elements sequentially, ensuring the user interacts with the core feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Integrate spotlight component into existing dashboard layout'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Once a user completes the onboarding, trigger a webhook to your CRM or email service. This is your 'marketing' engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a webhook service module that fires a payload upon successful completion of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/services/onboardingService.ts --action 'add webhook integration for conversion tracking'

steps.title: A/B Test Onboarding Branches
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wrap your onboarding in an A/B testing framework to see which path converts best.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lightweight A/B testing wrapper for the onboarding flow that tracks conversion metrics to local storage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Wrap onboarding flow in A/B test provider and track completion events'

pro_tips: Never ask for account setup before providing value; always defer signup until the user has experienced the 'Aha!' moment.
Use micro-copy that focuses on the user's outcome, not your tool's features.
Implement an 'Exit Intent' onboarding trigger that offers a simplified path if they attempt to close the app early.
Use Claude Code to periodically refactor your onboarding logic into a standalone library for reuse across all your client projects.
Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a flow they don't want is the fastest way to lose them.
content.next_steps: Deploy your new onboarding flow to a staging environment and use Claude Code to run a simulated user audit to identify friction points.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn your product into a growth engine. Stop worrying about marketing and start optimizing the user experience that pays for itself. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
